call of taiko
In the vibrant world of Neo Nakuza, a revolutionary cast of characters is emerging: Taiko Trailblazers.
Learn more
Learn more
STEP-BY-STEP PARTICIPATION GUIDE
How to participate in the
Call of Taiko
Follow these simple steps to dive into the world of Neo Nakuza and make your mark.
Connect
Kickstart your journey by connecting your X account. This quick setup is your gateway to the vibrant Taiko community.
Pinkify & Amplify
Update your profile picture with a generated Taiko pink design. Show your colors by sharing your new look on X and prove your participation.
Begin your trail
Lastly, register your wallet address. This step not only links your identity and prepares you to claim your exclusive faction badge, but also lets you be part of something bigger.
JOIN THE REVOLUTION
Pinkify
Your Profile!
Show your support for the Taiko community by pinkifying your profile. Change your profile picture to pink, and share it on X with #CallofTaiko to become part of the movement!
